title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is really bad. Kin’emon- San,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He was killed by the deadly gas!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: While looking for Kin’emon- San's son...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thank goodness. You got here before us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well, I guess he's not really okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't you worry about the children

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I wonder if they'll make it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Passage between R and D- blocks

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: WE HAVE NO TIME TO WASTE ESCAPING!!

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
